    DonorKeys
    CLASS TO MANAGE TAX-UNIT KEYS FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
    DonorPerson
    CLASS TO STORE PERSON-LEVEL DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
    DonorPersonPolicy
    CLASS TO STORE PERSON-LEVEL POLICY-DEPENDENT DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
    DonorTaxImputation
    CLASS TO MANAGE TAX IMPUTATIONS DRAWING ON DONOR DATA Imputations are made via a 3-step process: 1: obtain donor pool from full population by coarse-exact matching 2: obtain candidate pool from donor pool based on proximity to original income 3: select single candidate from donor pool or average over pool to impute disposable income
    DonorTaxUnit
    CLASS TO STORE DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS
    DonorTaxUnitPolicy
    CLASS TO STORE TAX-UNIT-LEVEL POLICY-DEPENDENT DATA FOR IMPUTING TAXES AND BENEFITS

    WRAPPER CLASS TO CONSOLIDATE SWITCHING OF FUNCTION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS

    CLASS TO MANAGE ONE SPECIFICATION FOR EVALUATING DONOR KEYS USED TO IMPUTE TAX AND BENEFIT PAYMENTS
